# CWE-649: Reliance on Obfuscation without Integrity Checking
lang: go
file: CWE-649-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/base64"
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// Vulnerable: role is base64-encoded in a cookie and trusted without integrity verification.
func AdminDashboard(c *gin.Context) {
	raw, err := c.Cookie("profile")
	if err != nil {
		c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusUnauthorized)
		return
	}
	decoded, _ := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(raw)
	if strings.Contains(string(decoded), "role=admin") {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"panel": "admin"})
		return
	}
	c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusForbidden)
}
